injury_alerts.title: Latest NBA buzz: Embiid out with appendicitis, Curry ruled out Thursday

0852cffec341701f6a0dde8619ae9f56.ai_analysis:
💡 推薦：芝加哥公牛 +6.5

公牛真實勝率高達69%，且近期以31分痛宰巫師，實力差距明顯。儘管盤口顯示主隊讓分，但獨贏賠率持續向公牛傾斜，顯示市場對公牛仍具信心，受讓6.5分應可輕鬆過關，該傷兵資訊極大可能為誤植。

53b49bbe56f8581f353bbbb5c6179ac5.ai_analysis:
💡 推薦：**Toronto Raptors -3.5**

主隊暴龍擁有較高的真實勝率 (60%)，且僅兩天前才以大比分 (121-95) 擊敗熱火，顯示其在對戰上具明顯優勢。在無傷兵、無疲勞警示的情況下，暴龍在主場讓分3.5分相當合理。雖然獨贏賠率有微幅調整向熱火傾斜，但幅度不大，未構成急速移動或聰明錢訊號，不足以動搖暴龍的強勁基本面。

bf30a732402325cab54ab666ee0f5c11.ai_analysis:
【💡 推薦：紐約尼克 -5.5】
紐約尼克真實勝率高達65%，盤口獨贏賠率持續下降，顯示市場資金明顯傾向主隊。考量尼克無傷兵與疲勞問題，並坐擁主場優勢，預計能有效壓制對手，順利贏下讓分盤。

injury_alerts.title: Sixers' Embiid undergoes surgery for appendicitis
Philadelphia's 76ers Joel Embiid out indefinitely following appendectomy

30b372ff1973370201b644c207be2dd3.ai_analysis:
【💡 推薦：讓分盤 Houston Rockets -6.5】
76ers核心Embiid因闌尾炎手術缺陣，戰力嚴重受損，使客隊勝率大幅降低。獨贏賠率出現單向大幅度移動，反映市場對火箭信心大增，顯現聰明錢訊號，結合火箭更高的真實勝率與主場優勢，看好主隊能輕鬆取勝並讓分過盤。

nba.title: 2026 NBA draft top 100: Where top prospects land on the big board after March
nba.summary: Here is the updated top 100 big board for the 2026 class after an exciting college season.

nba.title: Sixers' Embiid undergoes surgery for appendicitis
nba.summary: Philadelphia star center Joel Embiid has been diagnosed with appendicitis and is undergoing surgery Thursday in Houston. It's unclear when he'll be able to return.

nba.title: Warriors to rest Steph (knee) vs. LeBron, Lakers
nba.summary: The Warriors ruled out Stephen Curry for Thursday night's game against the Lakers, meaning there will be zero matchups between Curry and LeBron James this regular season.

nba.title: OKC locks up No. 1 seed, joins elite company
nba.summary: The Thunder clinched the NBA's best regular-season record with a win over the Clippers to join some exclusive company.

nba.title: NBA fines Magic $25K for injury report violation
nba.summary: The NBA fined the Orlando Magic $25,000 on Thursday for violating league injury reporting rules before Monday night's home game against the Detroit Pistons.

nba.title: Cunningham has double-double in Pistons return
nba.summary: Cade Cunningham had 13 points and 10 assists in his return from a collapsed lung as the Pistons routed the Bucks on Wednesday night.

nba.title: Stanford star freshman Okorie declares for draft
nba.summary: Stanford star guard Ebuka Okorie will enter the NBA draft after leading the ACC in scoring as a freshman.

nba.title: Sources: Kings' late foul was error, not tanking
nba.summary: The NBA is looking into what team sources say was a strategy mistake by Kings coach Doug Christie -- and not tanking tactics -- during Tuesday's loss to the Warriors.

nba.title: Mavs dispute claim they erred with Reaves' MRI
nba.summary: The Mavericks disputed Lakers coach JJ Redick's claim that their medical team examined the wrong part of Austin Reaves' body when the guard received an MRI by Dallas' staff.

nba.title: 🏀 Inside the NBA's tanking problem
nba.summary: With tanking strategies growing in both audaciousness and frequency of use, can the league get its arms around the often-effective practice?

soccer.title: Robertson to leave Liverpool at the end of the season
soccer.summary: Andy Robertson will leave Liverpool at the end of the season when his contract expires in the summer, the club has announced.

soccer.title: Arsenal's big summer - Arteta contract, £100m for Nwaneri and Lewis-Skelly
soccer.summary: Whatever happens this season, Arsenal are facing some big decisions in the summer over Mikel Arteta's contract and their transfer moves.

soccer.title: Seven games to go - how will De Zerbi try to save Spurs?
soccer.summary: Clubs at risk of relegation tend to hire pragmatic coaches - but Spurs have not done that by appointing Roberto de Zerbi.

soccer.title: Oliver and Taylor selected as World Cup referees
soccer.summary: Michael Oliver and Anthony Taylor have been named as referees for this summer's 2026 World Cup.

soccer.title: Sutton's predictions v boxing promoter & Arsenal fan Frank Warren
soccer.summary: Chris Sutton takes on boxing promoter Frank Warren plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.

soccer.title: FA investigating non-league chief over alleged abusive email
soccer.summary: The FA is investigating after Northern Premier League chairman Mark Harris allegedly sent an abusive email to an FC United of Manchester fan.

soccer.title: Barcelona complain to Uefa about VAR in Atletico loss
soccer.summary: Barcelona submit a complaint to Uefa over a "grave lack of VAR intervention" during their Champions League defeat by Atletico Madrid on Wednesday.

soccer.title: 'As pure as you can hit it!' Robertson scores against Wolves
soccer.summary: Liverpool left-back Andrew Robertson scores a superb opening goal for his side in their FA Cup fifth round tie against Wolves at Molineux.

soccer.title: Kudus may require surgery after injury setback
soccer.summary: Tottenham winger Mohammed Kudus may require surgery after suffering a setback in his recovery from a thigh injury.

soccer.title: Maguire on his major lows and belief he is still one of world's best
soccer.summary: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire on how his mum defended him in his lowest moments, his return to form, new contract and bright future
